branches.condition: User is a developer and wants to integrate programmatically
branches.effect_on_first_success: Allows adding people and triggering messages via code instead of UI
branches.path: Integrate Customer.io SDKs or APIs to add people and track events

branches.effect_on_first_success: Enables non-developers to onboard and send messages without coding
branches.path: Add people manually via UI or CSV upload

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Send your person a message (via campaign)

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: A message is successfully sent to a test person added to the workspace, triggered by a campaign
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Test person receives the message sent from the campaign
documented_first_success.official_milestone: Send your first message to a test person via a campaign
documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This milestone represents the first time the platform is used to send a personalized message to a person, demonstrating the core messaging functionality is operational.

assumed_prior_state: Developer has internet access and a supported modern browser
Developer has a domain to use for sending email messages
Developer has basic knowledge of messaging concepts
entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Customer.io account and workspace to start sending automated messages to people.

friction_gates.description: Must create a Customer.io account and workspace to proceed
Must have a domain and verify ownership to send email messages
Must configure email channel with domain and from address, including DNS records

prerequisites.requirement: Create a Customer.io account and workspace
Have a domain to configure for sending email messages
Configure email channel with domain, from address, and verify domain ownership
Understand basic messaging concepts and data model (people, attributes, events)

primary_path.action: Create a Customer.io account and workspace
details: Sign up for a Customer.io account
Create a workspace as a container for people, data, and messages
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Account creation errors or email verification delays
primary_path.success_signal: Workspace is created and accessible in the dashboard

primary_path.action: Set up email channel by entering domain and from address, then verify domain ownership
details: Add DNS records to domain host for verification and authentication
Optionally add CNAME for link tracking
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Waiting for DNS propagation or verification failure
primary_path.input: Domain name, email addresses, DNS records

primary_path.action: Add a test person to the workspace
details: Add a person with ID and email address
Add attributes like first_name and last_name
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Validation errors or missing required fields

primary_path.action: Create a campaign to send a message to the test person
details: Create a new campaign and name it
Create a data-driven segment including the test person
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Trigger misconfiguration or message delivery errors
primary_path.input: Campaign settings, segment criteria, message content
primary_path.success_signal: Campaign triggers and sends message to test person

primary_path.action: Send message to test person triggered by campaign
details: Message is sent via configured channel (email)
primary_path.input: Active campaign and test person in segment
primary_path.success_signal: Message delivery confirmation or receipt by test person

sections_used: Add a test person to your workspace
Create a campaign and send your person a message
sources.title: Quick start guide | Customer.io Docs

sections_used: Data Sources: getting people and data into Customer.io
Attributes and Events: understanding your people and data
sources.title: Welcome to Customer.io

alternatives_considered.name: API
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: APIs are used for integration and data ingestion but initial onboarding and first success is documented via the web console.

alternatives_considered.name: CLI or SDK
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: SDKs and client libraries support integration but onboarding steps focus on web console usage.

surface.name: Web Console
surface.selection_basis: Primary documented interface for onboarding and setup is the Customer.io web console and dashboard as shown in official quick start and getting started guides.

uncertainties.impact: Without this, time_to_first_success cannot include a vendor-claimed value, limiting benchmarking.
uncertainties.question: What is the typical or average time to first success (sending first message) as claimed or measured by Customer.io?
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: No explicit timing or duration claims found in official documentation or quick start guides.
